overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's cabin. The bus travels along wet urban streets during overcast dusk conditions, stopping at a bus stop for passengers and waiting at traffic lights before proceeding through intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban residential street with tree-lined alleys

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the wet road, windshield wipers active, approaching an intersection in the distance

digital display showing route map and stop information mounted on the right side
wipers moving across the front windshield clearing rain
exterior mirror showing traffic behind on the left side
exterior mirror showing traffic behind on the right side

multi-story concrete apartment blocks lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet urban residential street during overcast dusk conditions. Windshield wipers maintain visibility as the vehicle passes between concrete apartment blocks and tree-lined sidewalks. The dashboard and GPS navigation screens are prominently visible in the foreground.

events.description: pulling to stop at the bus stop curb to pick up waiting passengers
bus doors opening to allow passenger boarding
passengers finishing boarding and doors closing

agents.ego_description: stopping at the designated bus stop, opening doors for passengers to board, then preparing to depart

notable_agents.action: waiting at the bus stop shelter and boarding the bus through the front door

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels and bench for passengers
pole with bus route information and stop identification
cars parked along the right curb near the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls to a stop at a bus stop shelter on the right side of the road. Passengers are waiting and board the vehicle while the doors are open. The surrounding area features parked cars and concrete residential buildings.

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and continuing down the wet road toward a traffic signal

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic lights suspended over the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Having departed the bus stop, the bus accelerates along the wet asphalt road. The vehicle approaches a traffic signal at an upcoming intersection, with residential buildings continuing on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection stopped at red traffic light

events.description: stopping behind white sedan at red traffic light
traffic light turns green, preparing to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light behind a white sedan, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at the red light directly ahead of the bus

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the road surface at the intersection
metal rails embedded in the road for tram traffic crossing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a red traffic light at an urban intersection, waiting behind a white sedan. Crosswalk markings and tram tracks are visible on the wet road surface. The traffic signal pole is now closer as the bus waits for the light to change.

events.description: accelerating through the intersection on green light

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the intersection and continuing down the street, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

entered.detail: continuing row of apartment buildings beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates through the intersection on the green light and continues along the wet urban street. Pedestrians are visible walking on the sidewalks as the vehicle passes through the crossing and proceeds past the traffic signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a wet residential neighborhood toward a busy urban intersection during an overcast dusk. It begins with the vehicle driving past concrete apartment blocks and tree-lined sidewalks, with windshield wipers clearing the glass and GPS screens visible on the dashboard. As the bus pulls over to a roadside shelter, the camera pauses while passengers board the vehicle amidst a backdrop of parked cars and residential buildings. The scene then shifts as the bus accelerates away from the stop and approaches a traffic signal, eventually coming to a halt behind a white sedan where tram tracks and crosswalks glisten on the wet asphalt. Finally, the bus moves forward through the intersection on a green light, passing pedestrians on the sidewalks as it continues its journey along the damp city street.
